Imports Newtonsoft.Json

Module Parts
    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get a single part by PartID or PartNumber
    ''' Replaces: SELECT * FROM PART WHERE PartID=... OR PartNumber=...
    ''' Endpoint: /Parts/Get
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetPart(Optional ByVal partId As Integer = 0, Optional ByVal partNumber As String = "") As PartInfo

        Dim resultado As PartInfo = Nothing

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        If partId > 0 Then
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "PartID", .Value = partId})
        End If
        If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(partNumber) Then
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "PartNumber", .Value = partNumber})
        End If

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/Get", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of PartInfo)(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get all part numbers with ArrQty (PiecesByPanel)
    ''' Replaces: SELECT PartNumber, PartID, PiecesByPanel FROM PART
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetAllPartNumbers() As List(Of PartNumberInfo)

        Dim resultado As List(Of PartNumberInfo) = New List(Of PartNumberInfo)()

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/GetAllParts", "GET", Nothing)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of List(Of PartNumberInfo))(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get AOI quality change status (locked units configuration)
    ''' Replaces: SELECT PartID, CirRef, ContainsText, DefectCodeID FROM Quality_Inspection_AOI_ChangeStatus
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetAOIQualityChangeStatus() As List(Of AOIQualityChangeStatus)

        Dim resultado As List(Of AOIQualityChangeStatus) = New List(Of AOIQualityChangeStatus)()

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/GetAOIQualityChangeStatus", "GET", Nothing)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of List(Of AOIQualityChangeStatus))(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get merge counter for a part
    ''' Replaces: SELECT counter FROM PART_OPERATION_SERIALIZATION_MERGE_COUNTER WHERE partid=...
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetMergeCounter(ByVal partId As Integer) As Integer

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "partId", .Value = partId})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/GetMergeCounter", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            Return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of Integer)(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return 0
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Increment merge counter for a part (auto-creates if doesn't exist)
    ''' Replaces: UPDATE/INSERT PART_OPERATION_SERIALIZATION_MERGE_COUNTER
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function IncrementMergeCounter(ByVal partId As Integer) As Integer

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "partId", .Value = partId})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/IncrementMergeCounter", "POST", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            Return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of Integer)(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return 0
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Check if part should merge at AOI for given side and area
    ''' Replaces: SELECT * FROM PART_OPERATION_SERIALIZATION_MERGE_AUTO_AT_AOI WHERE PARTID=... AND Side=... AND AreaID=...
    ''' Endpoint: /Parts/ShouldMergeAtAOI
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function ShouldMergeAtAOI(ByVal partId As Integer, ByVal side As String, ByVal areaId As Integer) As Boolean

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "partId", .Value = partId})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "side", .Value = side})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "areaId", .Value = areaId})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/ShouldMergeAtAOI", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            Return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of Boolean)(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return False
    End Function
End Module

''' <summary>
''' Part Number Response (for GetAllPartNumbers)
''' </summary>
Public Class PartNumberInfo
    Public Property PartNumber As String
    Public Property PartID As Integer
    Public Property ArrQty As Integer
End Class

''' <summary>
''' Part Info Response (for Get)
''' </summary>
Public Class PartInfo
    Public Property PartNumber As String
    Public Property PartID As Integer
    Public Property Part_Key As Integer
    Public Property CustomerID As Integer
End Class

''' <summary>
''' AOI Quality Change Status Response
''' </summary>
Public Class AOIQualityChangeStatus
    Public Property PartID As Integer

    Public Property ContainsText As String
    Public Property DefectCodeID As Integer
End Class

''' <summary>
    ''' Get all part numbers with ArrQty (PiecesByPanel)
    ''' Replaces: SELECT PartNumber, PartID, PiecesByPanel FROM PART
    ''' Now supports pagination - automatically fetches all pages
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetAllPartNumbers() As List(Of PartNumberInfo)

        Dim resultado As List(Of PartNumberInfo) = New List(Of PartNumberInfo)()
        Dim pageNumber As Integer = 1
        Dim pageSize As Integer = 100 ' Adjust based on API performance
        Dim hasMorePages As Boolean = True

        While hasMorePages
            Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "pageNumber", .Value = pageNumber.ToString()})
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "pageSize", .Value = pageSize.ToString()})

            Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/GetAllParts", "GET", ParametersTransit)

            If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
                ' Check if API returns paginated response with metadata or just the data array
                Try
                    ' Try parsing as paginated response first
                    Dim paginatedResponse = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of PaginatedPartNumberResponse)(APIResponse.Response)

                    If paginatedResponse IsNot Nothing AndAlso paginatedResponse.Data IsNot Nothing Then
                        resultado.AddRange(paginatedResponse.Data)

                        ' Check if there are more pages
                        If paginatedResponse.Data.Count < pageSize OrElse pageNumber >= paginatedResponse.TotalPages Then
                            hasMorePages = False
                        Else
                            pageNumber += 1
                        End If
                    Else
                        hasMorePages = False
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                    ' If paginated parsing fails, try parsing as simple list (fallback for non-paginated response)
                    Try
                        Dim simpleList = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of List(Of PartNumberInfo))(APIResponse.Response)
                        If simpleList IsNot Nothing Then
                            resultado.AddRange(simpleList)
                        End If
                    Catch
                        ' Log error if needed
                        WriteToFile("Error parsing GetAllParts response: " & ex.Message)
                    End Try
                    hasMorePages = False
                End Try
            Else
                hasMorePages = False
                WriteToFile("GetAllPartNumbers API error: " & APIResponse.ResponseCode & " - " & APIResponse.ResponseMessage)
            End If
        End While

        Return resultado
    End Function

I've updated the `GetAllPartNumbers` function in `Parts.vb` to support pagination. Here's what I did:

''' <summary>
    ''' Get all part numbers with ArrQty (PiecesByPanel)
    ''' Replaces: SELECT PartNumber, PartID, PiecesByPanel FROM PART
    ''' Now supports pagination using skip/take pattern - automatically fetches all pages
    ''' API: GET /Parts/GetAllParts?skip=X&take=Y
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetAllPartNumbers() As List(Of PartNumberInfo)

        Dim resultado As List(Of PartNumberInfo) = New List(Of PartNumberInfo)()
        Dim skip As Integer = 0
        Dim take As Integer = 500 ' Fetch 500 records per page (18K total = ~36 API calls)
        Dim hasMorePages As Boolean = True

        WriteToFile("GetAllPartNumbers: Starting paginated fetch...")

        While hasMorePages
            Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "skip", .Value = skip.ToString()})
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "take", .Value = take.ToString()})

            Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/GetAllParts", "GET", ParametersTransit)

            If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
                Try
                    Dim pageData = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of List(Of PartNumberInfo))(APIResponse.Response)

                    If pageData IsNot Nothing AndAlso pageData.Count > 0 Then
                        resultado.AddRange(pageData)
                        WriteToFile($"GetAllPartNumbers: Fetched {pageData.Count} records (skip={skip}, total so far={resultado.Count})")

                        ' If we got fewer records than requested, we've reached the end
                        If pageData.Count < take Then
                            hasMorePages = False
                            WriteToFile($"GetAllPartNumbers: Completed. Total records: {resultado.Count}")
                        Else
                            skip += take
                        End If
                    Else
                        ' No data returned, we're done
                        hasMorePages = False
                        WriteToFile($"GetAllPartNumbers: No more data. Total records: {resultado.Count}")
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                    hasMorePages = False
                    WriteToFile("GetAllPartNumbers: Error parsing response: " & ex.Message)
                End Try
            Else
                hasMorePages = False
                WriteToFile($"GetAllPartNumbers: API error: {APIResponse.ResponseCode} - {APIResponse.ResponseMessage}")
            End If
        End While

        Return resultado
    End Function

﻿Imports Newtonsoft.Json

Module Parts
    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get a single part by PartID or PartNumber
    ''' Replaces: SELECT * FROM PART WHERE PartID=... OR PartNumber=...
    ''' Endpoint: /Parts/Get
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetPart(Optional ByVal partId As Integer = 0, Optional ByVal partNumber As String = "") As PartInfo

        Dim resultado As PartInfo = Nothing

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        If partId > 0 Then
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "PartID", .Value = partId})
        End If
        If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(partNumber) Then
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "PartNumber", .Value = partNumber})
        End If

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/Get", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of PartInfo)(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get all part numbers with ArrQty (PiecesByPanel)
    ''' Replaces: SELECT PartNumber, PartID, PiecesByPanel FROM PART
    ''' Now supports pagination using skip/take pattern - automatically fetches all pages
    ''' API: GET /Parts/GetAllParts?skip=X&take=Y
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetAllPartNumbers() As List(Of PartNumberInfo)

        Dim resultado As List(Of PartNumberInfo) = New List(Of PartNumberInfo)()
        Dim skip As Integer = 0
        Dim take As Integer = 500 ' Fetch 500 records per page (18K total = ~36 API calls)
        Dim hasMorePages As Boolean = True

        WriteToFile("GetAllPartNumbers: Starting paginated fetch...")

        While hasMorePages
            Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "skip", .Value = skip.ToString()})
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "take", .Value = take.ToString()})

            Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/GetAllParts", "GET", ParametersTransit)

            If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
                Try
                    Dim pageData = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of List(Of PartNumberInfo))(APIResponse.Response)

                    If pageData IsNot Nothing AndAlso pageData.Count > 0 Then
                        resultado.AddRange(pageData)
                        WriteToFile($"GetAllPartNumbers: Fetched {pageData.Count} records (skip={skip}, total so far={resultado.Count})")

                        ' If we got fewer records than requested, we've reached the end
                        If pageData.Count < take Then
                            hasMorePages = False
                            WriteToFile($"GetAllPartNumbers: Completed. Total records: {resultado.Count}")
                        Else
                            skip += take
                        End If
                    Else
                        ' No data returned, we're done
                        hasMorePages = False
                        WriteToFile($"GetAllPartNumbers: No more data. Total records: {resultado.Count}")
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                    hasMorePages = False
                    WriteToFile("GetAllPartNumbers: Error parsing response: " & ex.Message)
                End Try
            Else
                hasMorePages = False
                WriteToFile($"GetAllPartNumbers: API error: {APIResponse.ResponseCode} - {APIResponse.ResponseMessage}")
            End If
        End While

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get AOI quality change status (locked units configuration)
    ''' Replaces: SELECT PartID, CirRef, ContainsText, DefectCodeID FROM Quality_Inspection_AOI_ChangeStatus
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetAOIQualityChangeStatus() As List(Of AOIQualityChangeStatus)

        Dim resultado As List(Of AOIQualityChangeStatus) = New List(Of AOIQualityChangeStatus)()

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/GetAOIQualityChangeStatus", "GET", Nothing)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of List(Of AOIQualityChangeStatus))(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get merge counter for a part
    ''' Replaces: SELECT counter FROM PART_OPERATION_SERIALIZATION_MERGE_COUNTER WHERE partid=...
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetMergeCounter(ByVal partId As Integer) As Integer

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "partId", .Value = partId})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/GetMergeCounter", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            Return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of Integer)(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return 0
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Increment merge counter for a part (auto-creates if doesn't exist)
    ''' Replaces: UPDATE/INSERT PART_OPERATION_SERIALIZATION_MERGE_COUNTER
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function IncrementMergeCounter(ByVal partId As Integer) As Integer

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "partId", .Value = partId})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/IncrementMergeCounter", "POST", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            Return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of Integer)(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return 0
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Check if part should merge at AOI for given side and area
    ''' Replaces: SELECT * FROM PART_OPERATION_SERIALIZATION_MERGE_AUTO_AT_AOI WHERE PARTID=... AND Side=... AND AreaID=...
    ''' Endpoint: /Parts/ShouldMergeAtAOI
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function ShouldMergeAtAOI(ByVal partId As Integer, ByVal side As String, ByVal areaId As Integer) As Boolean

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "partId", .Value = partId})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "side", .Value = side})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "areaId", .Value = areaId})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Parts/ShouldMergeAtAOI", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            Return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of Boolean)(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return False
    End Function

## ✅ Updated for `skip`/`take` Pagination

I've updated the `GetAllPartNumbers` function to use the correct pagination parameters for your API.

### Key Changes

1. **Pagination Parameters**: Now uses `skip` and `take` instead of `pageNumber`/`pageSize`
   - `skip=0, take=500` → First 500 records
   - `skip=500, take=500` → Next 500 records
   - And so on...

2. **Page Size**: Set to **500 records per page**
   - With 18K total records, this means ~36 API calls
   - You can adjust this value in line 42 if needed (higher = fewer calls but larger responses)

3. **Logging**: Added detailed logging to track progress:
   - When pagination starts
   - Each page fetched (count and running total)
   - When pagination completes
   - Any errors encountered

4. **Exit Condition**: Stops fetching when:
   - A page returns fewer records than requested (indicating the last page)
   - A page returns no records
   - An API error occurs

### How It Works

```
Call 1: /Parts/GetAllParts?skip=0&take=500     → Returns 500 records
Call 2: /Parts/GetAllParts?skip=500&take=500   → Returns 500 records
Call 3: /Parts/GetAllParts?skip=1000&take=500  → Returns 500 records
...
Call 36: /Parts/GetAllParts?skip=17500&take=500 → Returns 500 records
Call 37: /Parts/GetAllParts?skip=18000&take=500 → Returns <500 records (STOP)
```

### Performance Considerations

- **Current**: 500 records/page = ~36 API calls for 18K records
- **If too slow**: Increase `take` to 1000 (= ~18 calls)
- **If API times out**: Decrease `take` to 250 (= ~72 calls)

The function maintains full backward compatibility - existing code calling `GetAllPartNumbers()` will continue to work without changes, it will just fetch data in chunks instead of all at once.
